response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong technical expertise and leadership in software development, with notable experience at top-tier tech companies like Google and Meta. His open-source contributions and entrepreneurial projects show initiative and a focus on AI-adjacent technologies. However, his experience is more hands-on and less explicitly tied to AI strategy or cloud platform leadership, which may limit his immediate fit for a Principal Engineer role focused on AI strategy.
strengths: Extensive experience (15+ years) at leading tech companies (Google, Meta) with full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure contributions.
Strong open-source and entrepreneurial background, including a geo-data platform used by NGOs and contributions to AI-adjacent tools.
Proven leadership in technical innovation, workshops, and mentorship, with a focus on testable, user-centric projects.
concerns: Lacks explicit AI strategy or cloud platform leadership experience, which is a core responsibility of the role.
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in an AI-related field, though practical experience partially offsets this.
Experience is more hands-on development than high-level strategic guidance for AI-driven product differentiation.
